sourceName: Seattle Issued Building Permits - Aggregate Residential Permit Activity
where: issueddate >= '2020-01-01T00:00:00' AND (housingunitsadded > 0 OR housingunitsremoved > 0 OR lower(permitclassmapped) like '%residential%')
notes: Official City of Seattle issued building permit records aggregated by issued month and mapped permit class. The adapter selects only issueddate, permitclassmapped, housing unit counts, and estimated cost; addresses, contractor names, locations, and links are not requested or stored.
